transactions.desc: The Phillies designated Cabrera for assignment Sunday.
The Pirates designated Wendzel for assignment Sunday, Alex Stumpf of MLB.com reports.
The Pirates selected Murdock's contract and optioned him to Triple-A Indianapolis on Sunday, Alex Stumpf of MLB.com reports.
The Nationals selected Yean's contract from Triple-A Rochester on Sunday.
The Nationals designated Hassell for assignment Sunday.
The Phillies signed De La Cruz to a major-league contract Sunday and optioned him to Triple-A Lehigh Valley, Todd Zolecki of MLB.com reports.
The Mets optioned Gerber to Triple-A Syracuse on Sunday.
The Mets selected Zuniga's contract from Triple-A Syracuse on Sunday.
The Yankees recalled Chivilli from Triple-A Scranton/Wilkes-Barre on Sunday.
The Rays recalled Englert from Triple-A Durham to start Sunday against the Astros.
The Rays optioned Martin to Triple-A Durham on Sunday.
Atlanta optioned Ritchie to Triple-A Gwinnett on Sunday.
Atlanta selected Carrasco's contract from Triple-A Gwinnett on Sunday.
Tellez has chosen to become a free agent after Atlanta outrighted him to Triple-A Gwinnett on Saturday, Barrett Sallee of 680 The Fan Atlanta reports.
Milwaukee recalled Yoho from Triple-A Nashville on Saturday.
The Dodgers optioned Robinson to Triple-A Oklahoma City on Saturday.
The Dodgers selected Alfonzo's contract from Triple-A Oklahoma City on Saturday.
The Cubs designated Wilson for assignment Saturday.
The Cubs signed Woodford to a major-league contract Saturday.
The Rockies selected Romano's contract from Triple-A Albuquerque on Saturday.
The Rockies recalled Sullivan from Triple-A Albuquerque on Saturday.
The Yankees optioned Beck to Triple-A Scranton/Wilkes-Barre on Saturday.
The Athletics optioned Meneses to Triple-A Las Vegas on Saturday.
The Athletics optioned Hernaiz to Triple-A Las Vegas on Saturday.
The Athletics selected Serven's contract from Triple-A Las Vegas on Saturday.
The Athletics reinstated Gelof (hand) from the 10-day injured list Saturday.
San Francisco recalled Bivens from Triple-A Sacramento on Saturday, Justice delos Santos of The San Jose Mercury News reports.
The Royals recalled Cuas from Triple-A Omaha on Saturday.
The Nationals optioned Kent to Triple-A Rochester on Saturday.
Washington claimed Krook off outright waivers from the Athletics on Saturday.
